projects.owner: Marinus Link Pty Ltd (owned by TasNetworks)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - significant HVDC equipment (HV transformers, converter stations, switchgear) procurement expected, target FAT and QAQC surveillance.
projects.summary: Major new HVDC interconnector project, critical for energy security, involving two 750 MW cables and associated converter stations, HV transformers, and switchgear in both Victoria and Tasmania. Final Investment Decision for Stage 1 expected Q4 2024. Significant HV equipment procurement to follow.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage now - pre-tender activities for major HV transmission lines and substations are underway, target detailed design and equipment specification for HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.summary: High-priority Renewable Energy Zone (REZ) transmission link connecting Victoria and NSW, including new 500kV and 330kV transmission lines and multiple new substations. Extensive scope for HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear, and GIS equipment.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialized QAQC and commissioning inspection for HV components (transformers, switchgear) for grid connection and main battery inverter systems are critical as project progresses.
projects.summary: Large-scale BESS designed to act as a 'shock absorber' for the grid. While main construction is underway, complex grid connection, substation works, and commissioning of significant HV equipment (power transformers, switchgear) will require ongoing specialist FAT and inspection.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing construction of major HV transmission lines and substations implies continued need for QAQC, FAT for incoming HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) and site supervision.
projects.summary: Enabling transmission infrastructure for the Central-West Orana REZ, including 330kV and 500kV lines, and multiple new or upgraded substations. Extensive HV components (transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear) requiring FAT and inspection throughout the construction phase.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2024 - as project progresses towards commissioning, specialist HV equipment (substation transformers, switchgear, grid connection BESS) will require final QAQC and commissioning inspections.
projects.summary: One of Australia's largest wind farms, coupled with a 100 MW BESS. Ongoing construction involves extensive electrical infrastructure, including the main substation with large HV transformers and switchgear for grid connection, offering opportunities for specialist inspection services.

projects.location: Hunter and Central Coast regions, NSW
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - early procurement for major HV transmission and substation components is anticipated. Ideal for technical due diligence and early vendor engagement.
projects.summary: Development of critical transmission infrastructure to unlock generation from the Hunter-Central Coast REZ. Will involve new HV transmission lines, multiple new substations, and associated HV equipment procurement (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS).

projects.projectName: Hydrogen Energy Supply Chain (HESC) Project - Commercial Scale
projects.owner: Japan-Australia partnership (J-POWER, Kawasaki Heavy Industries, AGL, et al.)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q1 2026 - as the project moves into detailed design and equipment procurement for commercial scale, significant HV electrical infrastructure will be required for the hydrogen production facility and export terminal.
projects.summary: Expansion of the pilot HESC project to commercial scale, focused on hydrogen production from brown coal with CCS. Requires substantial power infrastructure, including new substations and HV equipment for electrolysis and plant operations.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q4 2024 - procurement for main BESS packages and grid connection (including new HV transformers and switchgear for substation expansion) is expected to commence.
projects.summary: Expansion of the existing Western Downs Battery. The second stage will add 200MW/400MWh capacity, requiring further grid connection upgrades including new HV power transformers and switchgear at the substation for integration.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - procurement for specialized HV equipment upgrades (e.g., FACTS devices, transformer tap changers, protection relays) for increased capacity and stability.
projects.summary: Further targeted upgrades to the existing Queensland-NSW Interconnector to improve transfer capability and grid stability. This will involve substation equipment upgrades, including potentially new or enhanced HV switchgear and control systems.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - EPC awarded, focus on FAT for major HV equipment (step-up transformers, substation switchgear) and QAQC surveillance during construction.
projects.summary: 200 MW solar farm with a 40 MW/80 MWh BESS. EPC awarded. Significant HV infrastructure includes the main grid connection substation with power transformers and switchgear, presenting immediate FAT and QAQC opportunities.

projects.projectName: Origin Energy - Eraring Power Station BESS
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - procurement for the main BESS packages and grid connection infrastructure, including new HV transformers and switchgear for substation integration, is imminent.
projects.summary: Large-scale battery project at the site of the Eraring Power Station. Will require substantial grid connection works, including new high-voltage transformers, switchgear, and protection systems for substation integration to the existing transmission network.

projects.projectName: Digital Realty SYD11 Hyperscale Data Centre
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist QAQC for incoming HV equipment (e.g., tenant transformers, switchgear for new substations or grid connection augmentation) is ongoing or imminent.
projects.summary: New hyperscale data centre requiring a dedicated high-voltage grid connection and new on-site substations to support its significant power demands. Opportunities exist for QAQC and FAT for power transformers and medium/high voltage switchgear.

projects.projectName: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Data Centre Expansion (VIC)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing expansion requires continuous commissioning of new power infrastructure, including new substations and HV equipment, providing FAT and QAQC opportunities.
projects.summary: Continuous expansion of AWS data centre infrastructure in the Melbourne region. New availability zones and facilities consistently require significant power infrastructure upgrades, including new grid connections and substations with HV transformers and switchgear.

projects.projectName: Project Ranges Solar Farm and BESS
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - pre-tender phase for EPC, targeting engagement for HV equipment specifications, FAT, and QAQC for substation and grid connection components.
projects.summary: Large-scale solar PV project paired with a significant BESS. Will require new substation infrastructure and grid connection, including HV power transformers and switchgear, presenting opportunities for MadePartners.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - construction ongoing, focus on QAQC and commissioning inspection for HV grid connection equipment, including transformers and switchgear at the substation.
projects.summary: 100MW/200MWh battery energy storage system. Under construction, which will involve the installation and commissioning of HV electrical components for grid connection, including step-up transformers and substation switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - with significant portions under construction, specialist sub-packages for protection systems, control systems, and final commissioning of HV substations and lines (FAT for remaining equipment) are highly relevant.
projects.summary: Major new HV transmission interconnector. While main EPC is advanced, the scale and complexity mean continuous procurement and installation of substation components (HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) requiring FAT, QAQC, and commissioning inspection well into 2025.

projects.projectName: Neoen Goyder South Wind, Solar & BESS Stage 2
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - detailed design and procurement for the massive grid connection infrastructure, including new large-scale HV substations and transmission lines, will commence.
projects.summary: Second stage of a massive hybrid renewable energy zone, planned to include additional wind, solar, and battery storage. Will involve significant new HV transmission infrastructure and substations to connect to the grid, offering substantial scope for MadePartners.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q4 2025 - as detailed engineering and major equipment procurement begins, target FAT and QAQC for HV grid connection transformers and switchgear.
projects.summary: Large-scale battery planned for the former Liddell Power Station site. This project will leverage existing grid connection infrastructure but will require new HV integration equipment, including power transformers and switchgear within the substation.

projects.location: Snowy Mountains to Sydney region, NSW
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - major HV equipment procurement for new transmission lines and substations (HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) is expected to commence.
projects.summary: Critical 500kV transmission line project to connect new generation and reinforce the grid. Involves extensive new transmission lines and substations, demanding significant procurement of HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear, and GIS, making it a prime target for MadePartners.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - EPC awarded, focus on FAT for HV grid connection equipment (transformers, switchgear) and ongoing QAQC during installation and commissioning.
projects.summary: Expansion of the Capital Battery project. Construction of the second stage will require new HV components for grid connection and integration, including power transformers and substation switchgear, creating opportunities for specialist inspection services.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - awarded projects will move into detailed design and procurement phases for HV transmission lines and substations. Target FAT and QAQC for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS.
projects.summary: Recent ANEEL auction awarded 15 lots covering 6,464 km of new transmission lines and 9,200 MVA of transformation capacity across 14 states. This represents a massive opportunity for MadePartners involving numerous HV transformers, switchgear, and substations.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - projects awarded in late 2023 are progressing into detailed design and equipment procurement. Target FAT and QAQC for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS for substations and lines.
projects.summary: Auction held in December 2023, awarding 33 new transmission lots totaling 4,471 km of lines and 10,875 MVA of transformation capacity. These projects are now entering procurement for substations, HV transformers, and switchgear, offering immediate engagement opportunities.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - construction of hyperscale facility, focus on QAQC and FAT for HV transformers and switchgear for dedicated substation and grid connection.
projects.summary: New hyperscale data centre requiring a dedicated substation and high-voltage grid connection. Opportunities for MadePartners in FAT and QAQC for new power transformers and HV switchgear for critical power infrastructure.

projects.projectName: Casa dos Ventos - Rio do Vento II Wind Complex
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - with turbine procurement ongoing, focus on balance of plant EPC and substation equipment procurement (HV transformers, switchgear) for grid connection.
projects.summary: Expansion of a large wind complex. Will involve construction of new wind farms and associated collection substations, requiring multiple step-up HV transformers and grid connection infrastructure with associated switchgear and GIS.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing construction of hyperscale facility, focus on QAQC and FAT for HV transformers and switchgear for dedicated substation and grid connection.
projects.summary: Fifth hyperscale data centre in Jundiaí, a critical hub. Requires substantial high-voltage power infrastructure, including new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear for reliable grid connection and power distribution within the facility.

projects.location: Serra do Mel, Rio Grande do Norte
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - procurement for main EPC packages, including grid connection substation with HV transformers and switchgear, is imminent.
projects.summary: Expansion of an existing solar complex. This new phase will involve significant additional solar capacity requiring new collection substations and expansion of the main grid connection substation with new HV power transformers and switchgear.

projects.projectName: Fortescue Future Industries (FFI) Pecém Green Hydrogen Plant
projects.location: Pecém Industrial and Port Complex, Ceará
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - as detailed engineering and major equipment procurement begins, target FAT and QAQC for substantial HV electrical infrastructure required for large-scale electrolysis and plant operations.
projects.summary: Large-scale green hydrogen and ammonia production facility powered by renewable energy. This project will require significant new HV power infrastructure, including dedicated substations, HV transformers, and switchgear for electrolysis and plant operations, offering substantial MadePartners engagement potential.

projects.projectName: Eneva - Azulão II Thermoelectric Power Plant (with BESS for grid stability)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q4 2024 - procurement for main BESS packages and grid connection (including new HV transformers and switchgear for substation expansion) is expected to commence.
projects.summary: Gas-fired power plant expansion incorporating a large-scale BESS for grid stability and a new HV transmission line. Procurement will involve significant HV equipment for the substation and transmission assets (transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear).

projects.projectName: Rio Grande do Norte Transmission Reinforcement
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - upcoming ANEEL auction or direct tenders for transmission reinforcement projects will open. Target technical due diligence and pre-tender support for HV equipment.
projects.summary: Specific transmission reinforcement projects identified in EPE's Decennial Energy Expansion Plan (PDE) to support growing renewable generation in the state. Will involve new lines and substation upgrades, including HV transformers and switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - as detailed design and procurement commences, target FAT and QAQC for HV transformers and switchgear for new grid connection and substation infrastructure.
projects.summary: New hyperscale data centre, part of Equinix's ongoing expansion in Brazil. Requires substantial power infrastructure, including new dedicated substations and HV equipment for grid connection, such as power transformers and HV switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing construction means opportunities for QAQC and commissioning inspection of collection substations, main grid connection substation (HV transformers, switchgear), and associated HV lines.
projects.summary: Continued expansion of a large wind complex. Construction of new wind farms, requiring new and expanded collection substations, including multiple HV step-up transformers and associated switchgear for grid integration. Active opportunities for specialist inspection.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - as EPC tenders are released, focus on HV equipment procurement for the substation and grid connection, including power transformers and switchgear.
projects.summary: Large-scale solar PV project that will require new substation infrastructure for grid connection. This includes significant HV components like power transformers and switchgear, providing opportunities for MadePartners' services during procurement and construction.

projects.projectName: Porto do Açu Green Hydrogen Hub (Phase 1)
projects.location: Porto do Açu, Rio de Janeiro
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q4 2025 - as detailed design and equipment procurement for the first phase begins, target FAT and QAQC for HV electrical infrastructure for electrolysis and power supply.
projects.summary: First phase of a major green hydrogen production complex. This project will require significant new HV power infrastructure, including dedicated substations, HV transformers, and switchgear for the large-scale electrolysers and plant operations, making it a future MadePartners target.
